sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الْكَلِمَةَ الطَّيِّبَةَ لَهَا أَثَرٌ كَبِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da lijepa riječ ima veliki utjecaj.
sentences.translationEn: I think that a kind word has a great effect.

sentences.arabic: كَلِمَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ يُمْكِنُ أَنْ تُغَيِّرَ يَوْمَ شَخْصٍ كَامِلًا.
sentences.translation: Jedna jedina riječ može promijeniti cijeli dan neke osobe.
sentences.translationEn: A single word can change a person's whole day.

sentences.arabic: أَحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَتَكَلَّمَ بِلُطْفٍ مَعَ كُلِّ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se govoriti ljubazno sa svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: I try to speak kindly with all people.

sentences.arabic: الْكَلِمَاتُ الطَّيِّبَةُ تَبْقَى فِي الذَّاكِرَةِ طَوِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Lijepe riječi dugo ostaju u sjećanju.
sentences.translationEn: Kind words stay in the memory for a long time.
